mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_memory ( user_id, session_id, memory_type, content, importance, evidence_message_id, evidence_text, embedding, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId},
CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid) null , #{memoryType}, #{content}, #{importance},
CAST(#{evidenceMessageId} AS uuid) null , #{evidenceText}, #{embedding}::vector, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_memory SET embedding = #{embedding}::vector, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, session_id, memory_type, content, importance, evidence_message_id, evidence_text, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM user_memory WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, session_id, memory_type, content, importance, evidence_message_id, evidence_text, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM user_memory WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, session_id, memory_type, content, importance, evidence_message_id, evidence_text, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM user_memory WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND content = #{content} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, session_id, memory_type, content, importance, evidence_message_id, evidence_text, embedding, created_at, updated_at, embedding <=> #{vectorLiteral}::vector AS distance FROM user_memory WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY embedding <=> #{vectorLiteral}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_memory WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
